  "units": [
    {
      "class_name": "Class 10",
      "subject": "Science",
      "part_or_section": "",
      "unit_id": "U1",
      "unit_name": "Chemical Substances and Their Properties",
      "marks": null,
      "topics": [
        "Classification of elements in the Periodic Table",
        "Formation of compounds based on atomic structure (Bohr's model) and properties (valency)",
        "Nature and properties of chemical substances (distillation, crystallisation, chromatography, centrifugation)",
        "Types and properties of mixtures, solutions, colloids, and suspensions",
        "Chemical interactions and changes using symbols and chemical equations"
      ],
      "subtopics": [
        "Acid and base reactions",
        "Metal and non-metal reactions",
        "Reversible and irreversible reactions"
      ],
      "key_concepts": [
        "Atomic structure",
        "Valency",
        "Periodic Table classification",
        "Chemical equations",
        "Properties of mixtures"
      ]
    },
    {
      "class_name": "Class 10",
      "subject": "Science",
      "part_or_section": "",
      "unit_id": "U2",
      "unit_name": "Physical World and Motion",
      "marks": null,
      "topics": [
        "Newton's laws of motion",
        "Effect of forces (displacement, direction, velocity, acceleration)",
        "Uniform circular motion",
        "Acceleration due to gravity",
        "Graphical and mathematical representations of motion in one dimension",
        "Relationship between mass and weight",
        "Universal law of gravitation",
        "Lenses and image characteristics",
        "Ray diagrams and combination of lenses (telescope, microscope)",
        "Circuit characteristics (current, voltage, resistance)",
        "Ohm's law and everyday usage",
        "Work, potential energy, kinetic energy, conservation of energy",
        "Mechanical advantage and simple machines (levers, pulleys)",
        "Origin and properties of sound"
      ],
      "subtopics": [
        "Displacement and direction",
        "Velocity and acceleration",
        "Mass and weight relationship",
        "Focus and centre of curvature",
        "Current, voltage, resistance relationships",
        "Electricity bill and safety measures",
        "Conservation of energy expressions",
        "System of levers and pulleys",
        "Wavelength, frequency, amplitude"
      ],
      "key_concepts": [
        "Newton's laws",
        "Universal law of gravitation",
        "Lenses and optics",
        "Ohm's law",
        "Conservation of energy",
        "Mechanical advantage",
        "Sound propagation"
      ]
    },
    {
      "class_name": "Class 10",
      "subject": "Science",
      "part_or_section": "",
      "unit_id": "U3",
      "unit_name": "Living World and Earth Systems",
      "marks": null,
      "topics": [
        "Structure and function of the living world at the cellular level",
        "Role of cellular components (nucleus, mitochondria, endoplasmic reticulum, vacuoles, chloroplast, cell wall)",
        "Semi-permeability of cell membrane",
        "Interconnected systems supporting life on Earth"
      ],
      "subtopics": [
        "Cellular structural basis",
        "Functional basis of life processes",
        "Hydrosphere, biosphere, atmosphere, geosphere, cryosphere",
        "Earth processes and hazards"
      ],
      "key_concepts": [
        "Cellular components",
        "Cell membrane semi-permeability",
        "Interconnected systems",
        "Earth sciences"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "chapters": []
